items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for real-time availability sync to Google.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for real-time availability sync to Google, but the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations related to this specific requirement. While there are multiple passed steps indicating successful bookings and configurations, none of them directly address the real-time availability sync to Google, which is a critical component of the requirement. Therefore, the evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure, leading to a blocked status.
